name: 3Cs - Choices, Chances, and Changes
overview: An adventure thanks to a drunken night leads to best friends Chaitra, Chandu and Cat learning the 3 C's of life - choices, chances and changes - when their paths cross with a bunch of gangsters.

trailers.title: 3Cs - Choices, Chances, and Changes | Telugu | Sony LIV Originals | Streaming From Jan 6th
